notes: This local contract is independent from tw-rpc v1 and Relay v1/v2.
controlTargetId, controlEpoch, leaseId and fence are terminal-control namespace values.
Input adapters MUST NOT query status and then write a backend themselves; input operations execute inside the authority critical section.
Leases are liveness-bounded and must be renewed; expiry and controller restart enter RECOVERY_REQUIRED rather than FREE.
output.tail is a read-only observation capability. Its controlEpoch and outputGeneration fence late Feishu markers without granting input ownership.
handoff.commit is the durable transfer point and requires a persisted drain disposition.
